checkpoints.check_point:
Ensure the work zone is free from cotton waste, hand gloves, and welding wire.

Standard: Work area shall be free from cotton waste and unwanted materials.

A) Clean and Lubricate LHS & RHS slide movement.

Standard: Slides shall be free from dust and move smoothly.

Check and ensure the emergency switch is functioning properly.

Standard: Emergency switch shall be functional and not loose.

Check two‑hand operation functioning (Anti‑Tie Down & Anti‑Repeat system).

Standard: Two‑hand system shall be tightened and working properly.

Check safety sensor operation and ensure it is not loose.

Standard: Safety sensor shall be tightened and functioning properly.

Check the safety door operation (up & down movement).


Standard: Safety door shall be in proper working condition.

Check the condition of all push buttons on the operating panel.

Standard: Push buttons shall not be loose, broken, or missing and shall function correctly.

Check for any air leakage at tailstock clamping, valve bank, and safety door.

Standard: If leakage is identified, raise a tag and mention the tag number.

Check the torch condition.

Standard:Torch shall have no looseness, leakage, burn marks

Check the availability of CO₂ gas and verify flow rate.

Standard: Gas flow shall be between 25–30 LPM.

Check and clean the feeder roller and gear condition.

Standard: Feeder roller and gears shall be clean and free from damage.

Check and verify the calibration due date of air pressure gauge and CO₂ pressure gauge.

Standard: Calibration sticker shall be available and valid.

Check the proper working of the fume exhauster.

Standard: Fume exhauster shall be operational

Ensure all electrical panels are in closed condition.

Standard: Electrical panel doors shall remain closed at all times.

Make sure Deep Cleanig Activity, 5S Activity happening once in a week (Clean of Machine Surrounding)

Standard- All Machine should be dust free, Leakage free, Clean without Finger Prints

Ensure the work zone is free from cotton waste, hand gloves, welding wire, and other unwanted materials.

Standard: Area shall be free from cotton waste and unwanted materials.

Check and ensure the emergency switch is functioning properly.

Standard: Emergency switch shall be functional and not loose.

Check two-hand control operation (Anti-Tie Down & Anti-Repeat system).

Standard: Two-hand control system shall be functioning properly.

Check safety sensor operation and ensure it is not loose.

Standard: Safety sensor shall be functional and Tighten.

Check the safety door operation (up & down movement).

Standard: Safety door shall be in proper working condition.

Check the condition of all push buttons on the operating panel (no loose, broken, or missing buttons).

Standard: All push buttons shall be Tighten and functioning properly.

Check for any air leakage at tailstock clamping and safety door.

Standard: If leakage is found, raise a tag and mention the tag number.

Check the torch condition.

Standard: Torch shall have no looseness, leakage, or burn marks.

Check the availability and flow of argon gas.

Standard: Argon gas flow shall be between 15–30 LPM.

Check the feeder roller and gear wheel condition of the wire feeder.

Standard: Gear wheel teeth shall be free from damage.

Check the working condition of the fume exhauster.

Standard: Fume exhauster green indicator shall be ON.

Ensure all electrical panels are in closed condition.

Standard: Electrical panel doors shall always remain closed.

Check and clean the laser displacement sensor glass.

Standard: Sensor glass shall be clean and free from dust.

Check and verify the calibration due date sticker on air pressure gauge and CO₂ pressure gauge.

Standard: Calibration sticker shall be available and valid.

Ensure deep cleaning and 5S activities are carried out once a week (machine surrounding area).

Standard: All machine shall be dust-free, leakage-free, clean, and without finger prints.

Ensure all electrical panels are in closed condition.

Standard: Electrical panel doors shall always remain closed.

Check and ensure the emergency switch is functioning properly.

Standard: Emergency switch shall be functional and not loose.

Check all push buttons are in proper condition (no loose, broken, or missing buttons).

Standard: Push buttons shall be secure and functioning properly.

Check the safety sensor is functioning properly and securely fitted.

Standard: Safety sensor shall be Tighten and functioning properly.

Check two-hand clamping operation (Anti‑Tie Down & Anti‑Repeat system).

Standard: Two-hand clamping system shall function correctly.

Verify that chuck clamping sensors (LH & RH) are working effectively.

Standard: Sensors shall have no looseness, no damage, and shall function properly.

Check for any air leakage in the system.


Standard: If leakage is found, raise a tag and mention the tag number.

Ensure the chiller unit is working properly.


Standard: Chiller shall be operational, green indicator ON, and free from leakages.

Check and verify the calibration due date of the air pressure gauge and Argon pressure gauge.

Standard: Calibration sticker shall be available and valid.

Ensure deep cleaning and 5S activities are carried out once a week (machine and surrounding area).

Standard: All machines shall be dust-free, leakage-free, clean, and free from fingerprints.

Ensure the work zone is free from cotton waste, hand gloves, welding wire, and spatter.

Standard: Work area shall be free from cotton waste and unwanted materials.

Check for any air leakage at tailstock clamping, valve bank, and safety door.

Standard: If leakage is identified, raise a tag and mention the tag number.

Check Rhs & Lhs torch neck assembly insulation for any wear and tear.

Standard: Insulation shall have no wear or damage.

Check and lubricate the tailstock slide.


Standard: Tailstock slide shall be adequately lubricated

Check two-hand operation functioning (Anti‑Tie Down & Anti‑Repeat system).

Standard: Two-hand system shall be functioning properly.

Check the torch condition.

Standard:Torch shall have no looseness, leakage, burn marks

Check and ensure the emergency switch is functioning properly.
Standard: Emergency switch shall be functional and not loose.

Check safety sensor operation and ensure it is securely fitted.

Standard: Safety sensor shall be Tightened and functioning properly.

Check the condition of all push buttons on the operating panel.

Standard: Push buttons shall not be loose, broken, or missing and shall function correctly.

Check and clean the feeder roller and gear condition.

Standard: Feeder roller and gears shall be clean and free from damage.

Check the availability of CO₂ gas and verify flow rate.

Standard: Gas flow shall be between 25–30 LPM.

Ensure the cooling unit is working and check the coolant water level.

Standard: Coolant level shall be above the green marked level.

Ensure all electrical panels are in closed condition.

Standard: Electrical panel doors shall remain closed at all times.

Check the proper working of the fume exhauster.

Standard: Fume exhauster shall be operational

Check and verify the calibration due date of air pressure gauge and CO₂ pressure gauge.

Standard: Calibration sticker shall be available and valid.

Check the condition of material handling secondary wire ropes.

Standard: Wire ropes shall have no damage or cuts.

Check and verify that material handling gripper bolts and nuts are properly tightened.

Standard: Bolts and nuts shall be properly tightened.

Ensure deep cleaning and 5S activities are carried out once a week (machine and surrounding area).

Standard: All machines shall be dust-free, leakage-free, clean, and free from fingerprints.

Verify that the chuck clamping sensors (LH & RH) are working effectively.

Standard: Sensors shall be securely tightened and functioning properly.

Check the safety sensor is functioning correctly and is not loose.

Standard: Safety sensor shall be Tightened and functioning properly.

Check the two‑hand clamping operation (Anti‑Tie Down & Anti‑Repeat system).

Standard: Two‑hand clamping system shall be functioning properly.

Check the condition of all push buttons on the operating panel.

Standard: Push buttons shall not be loose, broken, or missing and shall function correctly.

A) Check projection pads (LH & RH) for cleanliness
B) Ensure projection welding shoe bolts are properly tightened

Standard: Projection pads shall be clean, and welding shoe bolts shall be securely tightened.

Check projection welding pressure switch air pressure

Standard: Projection welding air pressure shall be maintained at ≥ 4 kg/cm².

Check for any air leakage in the system.

Standard: If leakage is detected, raise a tag and mention the tag number.

Ensure all electrical panels are in closed condition.

Standard: Electrical panel doors shall always remain closed.

Check and ensure the emergency switch is functioning properly.

Standard: Emergency switch shall be functional and not loose.

Check and verify the calibration due date on the air pressure gauge.

Standard: Calibration sticker shall be available and valid.

Check the condition of material handling secondary wire ropes.

Standard: Wire ropes shall have no damage or cuts.

Check and verify that material handling gripper bolts and nuts are properly tightened.

Standard: Bolts and nuts shall be properly tightened.

Make sure Deep Cleanig Activity, 5S Activity happening once in a week (Clean of Machine Surrounding)

Standard- All Machine should be dust free, Leakage free, Clean without Finger Prints

Standard: Free from abnormal sound & push button shall be functional and not loose.
